name: Cloud Controls Matrix
description: CCM v4.0.13 — incremental update to v4.0. 197 controls across 17 domains with cross-framework mappings (NIST CSF, ISO 27001/27017/27018, NIST SP 800-53r5, AICPA TSC, PCI DSS v3.2.1, HIPAA, FedRAMP, etc.). The .13 patch number reflects errata corrections after the v4.0 release.
relationToCloudSecurity: The flagship cloud-security controls framework. Foundation for CSA STAR Registry and cross-industry cloud compliance mappings.
relationToAISecurity: Covers cloud-platform controls underlying AI workloads. AI-specific overlays in AICM.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

lifecycle.notes: Patch release; 4.1 is the current major version.

current_extraction.notes: CCM v4.0.13 parsed JSON with all 197 controls plus cross-framework mappings.

notes: Use 4.1 for current work; 4.0.13 retained for backwards-compatible mappings.
